'''rafovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huchen|huchen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huchen|huchen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rafovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræfeveth|ræfeveth]] || [[word:ræfevej|ræfevej]] || [[word:ræfevesh|ræfevesh]] || [[word:ræfeve|ræfeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rafofovoth|rafofovoth]] || [[word:rafofovoj|rafofovoj]] || [[word:rafofovosh|rafofovosh]] || [[word:rafofovo|rafofovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rafovoth|rafovoth]] || [[word:rafovoj|rafovoj]] || [[word:rafovosh|rafovosh]] || [[word:rafovo|rafovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rafofvoth|rafofvoth]] || [[word:rafofvoj|rafofvoj]] || [[word:rafofvosh|rafofvosh]] || [[word:rafofvof|rafofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rafovotho|rafovotho]] || [[word:rafovojo|rafovojo]] || [[word:rafovosho|rafovosho]] || [[word:rafovoko|rafovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rafovoth|rafovoth]] || [[word:rafovoj|rafovoj]] || [[word:rafovosh|rafovosh]] || [[word:rafovo|rafovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rafovothol|rafovothol]] || [[word:rafovojol|rafovojol]] || [[word:rafovoshol|rafovoshol]] || [[word:rafovokol|rafovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rafovothotho|rafovothotho]] || [[word:rafovojojo|rafovojojo]] || [[word:rafovoshosho|rafovoshosho]] || [[word:rafovoko|rafovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rafovothon|rafovothon]] || [[word:rafovojon|rafovojon]] || [[word:rafovoshon|rafovoshon]] || [[word:rafovokon|rafovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rafovothoro|rafovothoro]] || [[word:rafovojoro|rafovojoro]] || [[word:rafovoshoro|rafovoshoro]] || [[word:rafovokoro|rafovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
